overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective walking across a desert bridge at sunset. The camera passes abandoned vehicles including a green armored car and a police cruiser before stopping at a scenic overlook of the futuristic cityscape and desert valley below.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge deck toward abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: six-wheeled armored vehicle with metallic green paint and gold trim
derelict black car with open doors on the left side of the bridge
futuristic cityscape with tall glass towers silhouetted against the sunset
tall electrical pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit bridge in a desert wasteland, with a distinctive green six-wheeled armored car dominating the center of the frame. The camera moves forward past abandoned vehicles while the futuristic city skyline looms in the golden-hour haze ahead.

events.description: passing the green armored car and approaching an abandoned police vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge deck, passing the police cruiser on the right

notable_agents.action: abandoned police car with flashing red and blue lights parked on the bridge

entered.detail: white and black police cruiser with roof lights and push bar
metal guardrail with colorful advertisement posters facing the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the green armored vehicle and approaches a police car parked on the right side of the bridge. Bridge railings with billboards line the left side as the camera continues walking toward the city overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook of desert city valley

events.description: reaches the bridge railing revealing the expansive view of the desert valley and highway interchange below

agents.ego_description: stopping at the bridge railing to overlook the cityscape and desert terrain

entered.detail: desert yucca tree with spiky leaves on the rocky hillside
multi-level highway ramps and overpasses in the valley below
large sandstone boulders and desert terrain

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the police car and approaches the bridge railing, where the view opens up to reveal a stunning vista of the desert valley, highway interchanges, and the futuristic city skyline glowing in the golden sunset. Joshua trees and rocky terrain frame the foreground as the camera stops to take in the panoramic view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement across a desolate desert bridge that gradually opens into a panoramic vista of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by advancing toward a distinctive green six-wheeled armored car centered in the frame, with the city skyline looming through a golden-hour haze in the distance. As the camera moves past the armored vehicle, it glides toward a police car parked on the right while passing billboards lining the bridge railings. The scene then expands as the camera clears the police cruiser and approaches the edge of the bridge, where the horizon opens up to reveal a vast desert valley and complex highway interchanges. Finally, the movement comes to a halt at the railing, framing the glowing city skyline and rocky terrain dotted with Joshua trees under the light of a golden sunset.
